title: eclipta alba f. zippeliana
intro: Eclipta alba f. zippeliana, also known as false daisy or Eclipta, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Eclipta alba f. zippeliana include improving liver function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting hair growth. This plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also sometimes used in topical applications and as a dietary supplement.
